description: Sobo Beaches is a UK marketplace for browsing, booking, and hosting beach huts, focused on Dorset and nearby south-coast locations. It offers guest booking, host listings, and related guides and support content.
summary: sobobeaches.com exposes a public consumer website and llms.txt, but no documented developer integration surfaces (no public API, GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI) were found on the domain.
